title: diplazium cavalerianum
intro: Diplazium cavalerianum, also known as Cavalerie's umbrella fern or umbrella fern, is a species of fern in the family Athyriaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Diplazium cavalerianum include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Diplazium cavalerianum is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion by steeping the dried leaves in hot water, and it may also be used as a poultice to apply directly to the affected area.
